call_transcript: Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? Customer: Yeah, hi. Fine, I guess. Agent: Great! So, we're pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%.  Is that something you'd be interested in discussing? Customer: Well, I'm looking at consolidating some debt.  What are the terms like? Agent: Absolutely. The loan term is flexible, from 2 to 5 years.  We can tailor it to your monthly budget.  What kind of monthly payment are you comfortable with? Customer: I don't know, maybe around $200? Agent: Okay, let me run some numbers... With a 5-year term, your monthly payment would be approximately $198.  That includes the principal and interest.  There's a small origination fee of 1%, so $100. Customer: Hmm, okay. That sounds…reasonable. Agent: Excellent!  We can get the paperwork started right away.  Do you have a valid driver's license and proof of income handy? Customer: Yeah, I think so. Agent: Fantastic. Let's get this done for you.

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We have a special offer on our Signature Credit Card. Customer: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. Agent: Sir, we… uh… we acquired your information through a marketing partner. We are pre-approving you for a $5,000 Signature Credit Card at an interest rate of 19.99%. Customer: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's outrageous! I'm already getting bombarded with calls. Agent: Well, sir, it's a rewards card… Customer: (Interrupting) I don't want a rewards card! I want you to take my number off your list! (Click)

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I understand you were referred to us by a valued partner.  How are you today? Customer: Yeah, hi. Doing okay.  My friend said you guys had good rates. Agent: Absolutely! We strive to offer the best rates possible. We're pre-approving you for a $20,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 7.49%. What are you planning to use the funds for? Customer: I'm thinking about renovating my kitchen. Agent: Excellent! A kitchen renovation is a great investment.  We can offer terms from 3 to 7 years.  What monthly payment are you looking at? Customer: I'd like to keep it under $350 if possible. Agent: Let me see… With a 7-year term, your monthly payment would be around $325. There's a 2% origination fee, so $400. Customer: Okay, that's pretty good.  What about prepayment penalties? Agent: We don't have any prepayment penalties. You can pay off the loan early without any extra charges. Customer: That's good to know.  Alright, let's do it.

Agent: Hello, Mr. Brown? This is Lisa from Finance Solutions. We're offering a great deal on our Signature Credit Card. Customer: (Interrupting) Look, you guys called me yesterday! I told you I wasn't interested!  Get me off your list! Agent: Sir, I apologize for the inconvenience. We are pre-approving you for a $2,500 Signature Credit Card at 17.99%. Customer: 17.99?! That's a rip-off! I have excellent credit!  You're wasting my time. Agent: Sir, the rate is based on several factors… Customer: (Interrupting) I don't care about factors! I want you to stop calling me! I'm filing a complaint! Agent: Sir, please… Customer: (Yelling) Just remove my number! Now! (Click)

Agent: Hi Maria, this is John calling from Finance Solutions. I see you're an existing customer and recently inquired about a personal loan. How are you doing today? Customer: Oh, hello. I'm alright. I was just looking at options for some home repairs. Agent: Perfect! We're pre-approving you for a $7,500 Personal Loan at a rate of 9.49%.  We can definitely help with those repairs. What kind of repairs are you planning? Customer: Well, the roof is leaking, and the bathroom needs some work. It's a bit overwhelming, to be honest. Agent: I understand. Home repairs can be stressful. We can break down the payments into manageable monthly installments.  We offer terms from 1 to 7 years.  What kind of monthly payment would you be comfortable with? Customer: I'm not sure… could you give me some examples? Agent: Absolutely. With a 5-year term, your monthly payment would be around $150. There's a 1.5% origination fee, so $112.50. Customer: Hmm, that sounds… doable.  But I need to think about it. Agent: Of course. I can send you a detailed breakdown of the loan terms via email. Would that be helpful? Customer: Yes, please. That would be great. Agent: Wonderful. I'll send that over right away.  Feel free to reach out if you have any questions.

Agent: Hi David, this is Mark from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special credit card… Customer: (Interrupting) Where did you even get my number? I never signed up for anything. Agent: Sir, we… uh… we acquired your information… We are pre-approving you for a $1,000 Signature Credit Card at 22.99%. Customer: 22.99?! No way! That's insane! (Click)

Agent: Hi Linda, this is David from Finance Solutions. I understand you were referred to us by a trusted partner. How are you doing this evening? Customer: I'm doing well, thank you. I'm considering a home renovation project. Agent: Excellent! We're pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 7.99%.  That sounds like a significant project. What are you planning to do? Customer: I want to remodel the kitchen and update the bathrooms. Agent: Wonderful! We can definitely help with that. We offer flexible terms, from 3 to 10 years. What monthly payment are you comfortable with? Customer: I'd like to keep it under $300 if possible. Agent: Let me calculate that for you… With a 7-year term, your monthly payment would be approximately $265. There's a 2.5% origination fee, which is $375.  There's also a small monthly service fee of $5. Customer: A monthly service fee? What's that for? Agent: It covers the cost of maintaining your account and providing access to our online portal. Customer: Hmm, okay.  Is there any way to waive that fee? Agent: Unfortunately, no. It's a standard fee for all our personal loans. However, you can save money by making payments online, as there's no charge for online payments. Customer: Alright, that's fair. What about early repayment? Agent: There are no penalties for early repayment. You can pay off the loan as quickly as you like without any extra charges. Customer: That's good to know.  Okay, I think I'm ready to move forward. Agent: Fantastic! Let's get the paperwork started. I'll need some information from you, including your driver's license and proof of income.

Agent: Hello, Mr. O'Connell? This is Sarah from Finance Solutions. We have a great offer on our Signature Credit Card. Customer: (Interrupting) Seriously? Where did you get my number? I'm on the Do Not Call list! Agent: Sir, we are pre-approving you for a $500 Signature Credit Card at an interest rate of 20.49%. Customer: 20.49?! You've got to be kidding me! (Click)

Agent: Hello, Mrs. Wilson? This is Lisa from Finance Solutions. I see you inquired about a personal loan on our website. How are you today? Customer: Oh, hello dear. I'm a little hard of hearing, could you speak up? Agent: Certainly. We're pre-approving you for a $2,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 14.99%.  Are you looking to consolidate debt or for another purpose? Customer: A loan? Oh, my. I'm not sure I understand. What did you say the rate was? Agent: 14.99%, ma'am. That means for every $100 you borrow, you'll pay $14.99 in interest over the year. Customer: Oh dear. That sounds… complicated. I need to think about it. I'm not very good with numbers. Agent: Of course. I understand. I can send you a detailed breakdown of the loan terms via email. Would that be helpful? Customer: Yes, please. That would be very kind. Agent: Wonderful. I'll send that over right away.  Please take your time to review it, and feel free to call back if you have any questions.

Agent: Hi Anthony, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I understand you were referred to us by one of our partners. How are you doing tonight? Customer: Yeah, good, good. I was looking into a loan for a down payment on a property. Agent: Excellent! We're pre-approving you for a $25,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 6.99%. That's a fantastic rate, especially with your credit score. What kind of property are you looking at? Customer: It's a condo in Brooklyn. Agent: Great choice! We can offer terms from 3 to 10 years. What monthly payment are you aiming for? Customer: I'd like to keep it under $400 if possible. Agent: Let me run some numbers… With a 7-year term, your monthly payment would be approximately $385. There's a 1% origination fee, so $250. There's also a small monthly account maintenance fee of $3. Customer: Okay, that sounds reasonable. What are the penalties for paying it off early? Agent: There are absolutely no penalties for early repayment. You can pay it off whenever you like without any extra charges. Customer: That's good. I might be able to pay it off faster if I get a bonus at work. Agent: That's excellent! We encourage our customers to pay off their loans as quickly as possible.  We also offer a rate discount if you set up automatic payments. Customer: Oh, really? How much of a discount? Agent: 0.25%. So your rate would drop to 6.74%. Customer: That's a good incentive. Alright, let's do it. I'm ready to move forward. Agent: Fantastic! Let's get the paperwork started. I'll need some information from you, including your driver's license, social security number, and proof of income. We'll also need a copy of the purchase agreement for the condo.
